headline: Mid-America Apartment Communities Expands Credit Capacity As Sun Belt Rents Stir
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities (NYSE:MAA) secured a new $1.5b unsecured revolving credit facility. The facility increases liquidity and is intended to support future growth initiatives and development projects. Management has pointed to early signs of rent pricing recovery and steady demand across its Sun Belt portfolio. Mid-America Apartment Communities, a multifamily REIT focused on Sun Belt apartments, operates in markets characterized by population growth and renter demand in key...
